summary: Normalizes a path or URL-like string by resolving dot segments and redundant separators while preserving absolute and URL structure.
signature_intent: Accepts a single string-like path or URL input and returns a normalized string.
behavior: Parses URL-like inputs and normalizes only their path component when present.
Returns URL-like inputs unchanged when they contain no path component.
Collapses repeated forward slashes within the normalized path.
Resolves parent-directory segments against preceding normal segments.
Returns a regenerated URL-like string when the input was parsed as URL-like.
Returns a normalized path string for non-URL inputs.
edge_cases: An empty normalized absolute path becomes "/".
An empty normalized relative path becomes ".".
Leading parent-directory traversal in relative paths is preserved when it cannot be resolved.
Parent-directory traversal at an absolute root does not remove the root.
Trailing separators may be removed during normalization.
